  have h₃ : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) * (if k % 2 = 1 then 1 else 0)) ≡
    (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) * (1 - (-1)^k) / 2) [ZMOD 5] := by
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k hk
    split_ifs with h₄
    · have h₅ : (-1 : ℤ)^k = -1 := by
        have h₆ : k % 2 = 1 := by
          split_ifs at hk <;> simp_all
        simp [h₆, Int.neg_one_pow_odd]
      simp_all
    · have h₅ : (-1 : ℤ)^k = 1 := by
        have h₆ : k % 2 = 0 := by
          split_ifs at hk <;> simp_all
        simp [h₆, Int.neg_one_pow_even]
      simp_all
  rw [h₃]
  have h₄ : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) * (1 - (-1)^k) / 2) =
    ((∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k)) -
    (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) * (-1)^k)) / 2 := by
    simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
  rw [h₄]
  have h₅ : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) = (1 + 2)^(2 * n + 1) := by
    rw [add_pow]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k hk
    simp [Nat.choose, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, Nat.add_sub_assoc]
  have h₆ : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k) * (2^k) * (-1)^k = (1 - 2)^(2 * n + 1) := by
    rw [sub_eq_add_neg, add_pow]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k hk
    simp [Nat.choose, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, Nat.add_sub_assoc]
  rw [h₅, h₆]
  simp
  have h₇ : (3^(2 * n + 1) - (-1)^(2 * n + 1)) / 2 % 5 ≠ 0 := by
    have h₈ : 3^4 ≡ 1 [ZMOD 5] := by
      norm_num
    have h₉ : (-1 : ℤ)^(2 * n + 1) = -1 := by
      simp [Int.neg_one_pow_odd]
    rw [h₉]
    have h₁₀ : 3^(2 * n + 1) % 5 = 3^((2 * n + 1) % 4) % 5 := by
      rw [Int.ModEq.pow_totient h₈]
      omega
    have h₁₁ : (2 * n + 1) % 4 = 1 ∨ (2 * n + 1) % 4 = 3 := by
      omega
    cases h₁₁ with
    | inl h₁₂ =>
      rw [h₁₂]
      norm_num
    | inr h₁₂ =>
      rw [h₁₂]
      norm_num
  omega
